ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the statement belongs to */,
  "quarter_end" TEXT /* Quarter end date of the financial statement */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares outstanding */,
  "shares_split_adjusted" INTEGER /* Number of shares outstanding after split adjustment */,
  "split_factor" REAL /* Split factor for the statement */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the statement */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter of the statement */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q) */,
  "filed_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was filed with the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheet" (
  "sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the sheet belongs to */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets */,
  "current_assets" REAL /* Current assets */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities */,
  "current_liabilities" REAL /* Current liabilities */,
  "shareholders_equity" REAL /* Shareholders' equity */,
  "long_term_assets" REAL /* Total long-term assets */,
  "long_term_liabilities" REAL /* Total long-term liabilities */,
  "intangible_assets" REAL /* Intangible assets */,
  "goodwill" REAL /* Goodwill */,
  "retained_earnings" REAL /* Retained earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheet_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statement" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the income statement belongs to */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Total earnings */,
  "eps_basic" REAL /* Basic EPS */,
  "eps_diluted" REAL /* Diluted EPS */,
  "cost_of_revenue" REAL /* Cost of revenue */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the cash flow statement belongs to */,
  "cash_operating" REAL /* Cash from operating activities */,
  "cash_investing" REAL /* Cash from investing activities */,
  "cash_financing" REAL /* Cash from financing activities */,
  "capital_expenditures" REAL /* Capital expenditures */,
  "free_cash_flow" REAL /* Free cash flow */,
  "dividends_paid" REAL /* Dividends paid */,
  "stock_repurchased" REAL /* Stock repurchased */,
  "net_change_in_cash" REAL /* Net change in cash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the price belongs to */,
  "quarter_end" TEXT /* Quarter end date of the stock price */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price */,
  "price_high" REAL /* High stock price for the quarter */,
  "price_low" REAL /* Low stock price for the quarter */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "average_volume" INTEGER /* Average trading volume over a period */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the ratio belongs to */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity (ROE) */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets (ROA) */,
  "book_value_per_share" REAL /* Book value per share */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book (P/B) ratio */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "interest_coverage" REAL /* Interest coverage ratio */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "net_profit_margin" REAL /* Net profit margin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratios_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
